# AVAudioConverterOutputStatus.endOfStream

**Case**

A status that indicates the method reaches the end of the stream, and doesn’t return any data.

## Declaration

```swift
case endOfStream
```

## Status Options

- **AVAudioConverterOutputStatus.haveData**: A status that indicates that the method returns all of the requested data.
- **AVAudioConverterOutputStatus.inputRanDry**: A status that indicates the method doesn’t have enough input available to satisfy the request.
- **AVAudioConverterOutputStatus.error**: A status that indicates the method encounters an error.
